title: hex docs — Static Site Generator

phases.title: Scaffold hex docs command + output skeleton
phases.description: Wire up the new hex docs subcommand in hex-cli, add pulldown-cmark and minijinja dependencies, create the output directory skeleton and base HTML template.
deliverables: hex-cli/src/commands/docs.rs — DocsAction enum (Generate, Serve) with clap definitions
hex-cli/src/commands/mod.rs — register docs command
hex-cli/src/main.rs — route DocsCli to docs::run()
hex-cli/Cargo.toml — add pulldown-cmark, minijinja
hex-cli/assets/docs/ — base CSS (style.css) and search JS (search.js) as embedded assets
Generator skeleton: create output dir, copy static assets, write placeholder index.html
phases.acceptance: hex docs generate produces hex-docs/ with index.html and static/ dir; hex docs --help shows Generate and Serve subcommands

phases.title: Commands section — clap tree introspection
phases.description: Walk the live clap Command tree to generate commands/index.html and one page per top-level command. Each page lists subcommands, flags (short/long/type/default/required), and description.
deliverables: hex-cli/src/docs/commands.rs — walk_commands() traverses clap::Command recursively
CommandDoc struct: name, about, subcommands, flags (name, short, long, help, required, default)
commands/index.html — table of all top-level commands
commands/<name>.html — per-command page with full flag reference
Navigation breadcrumbs: Home > Commands > <name>
phases.acceptance: All 32 top-level commands appear in commands/index.html; hex dev page shows all subcommands (start, list, resume, load, clean) with their flags

phases.title: Skills section — embedded frontmatter extraction
phases.description: Read skill definitions from the rust-embed bundle, parse frontmatter, render skills/index.html and per-skill pages.
deliverables: hex-cli/src/docs/skills.rs — SkillDoc struct + extract_skills() from embedded assets
Reuse parse_skill_frontmatter() pattern from hex-nexus/src/routes/skills.rs
skills/index.html — sorted table: trigger | name | description
skills/<name>.html — full skill page: trigger as copyable code block, full markdown body rendered to HTML
Distinguish hex-native (from assets/skills/) vs .claude/skills/ if both present
phases.acceptance: All 20 hex-native skills appear; /hex-scaffold trigger shows as a copyable block; skill body (prompt content) is rendered as HTML

phases.title: Agents and swarms sections
phases.description: Generate agents/ and swarms/ sections from embedded YAML definitions.
deliverables: hex-cli/src/docs/agents.rs — AgentDoc struct + extract_agents() from assets/agents/
agents/index.html — table: role | model tier | description
agents/<name>.html — YAML source in syntax-highlighted code block, parsed fields displayed
swarms/index.html — table of swarm behavior YAMLs from assets/swarms/
Parsed fields highlighted: model.tier, workflow.phases, feedback_loop gates, quality thresholds
phases.acceptance: All 14 agents appear; hex-coder.html shows YAML source and highlights model tier and workflow phases

phases.title: ADRs section — markdown rendering
phases.description: Read docs/adrs/*.md, parse status from frontmatter or H2 content, render to HTML via pulldown-cmark, generate grouped index.
deliverables: hex-cli/src/docs/adrs.rs — AdrDoc struct + extract_adrs(docs_path) from filesystem
adrs/index.html — three sections: Accepted | Proposed | Deprecated, each as a table
adrs/<id>.html — full ADR rendered to HTML; metadata block (Status, Date, Deciders) at top
ADR cross-references (e.g. ADR-2603221522) converted to hyperlinks within the site
Fallback: if docs/adrs/ not present, adrs/ section shows 'ADRs not available in this build'
phases.acceptance: ADR index shows correct status groupings for all 100+ ADRs; ADR-001 renders with metadata block; cross-reference links resolve correctly

phases.title: Search index + client-side search
phases.description: Build a JSON search index from all generated content, bundle it, and wire up search.js for client-side filtering across all sections.
deliverables: static/search-index.json — generated at build time: array of {id, title, section, body, url}
static/search.js — vanilla JS: debounced input, filter against index, render results
Search box in navigation header on all pages
Results show section badge (command / skill / agent / adr) and snippet
No external JS dependencies
phases.acceptance: Searching 'scaffold' returns the hex-scaffold skill and any commands mentioning scaffold; searching 'swarm' returns swarm command, swarm-coordinator agent, and swarm ADRs; works offline (file:// URL)

phases.title: hex docs serve + hex-nexus /docs route
phases.description: Wire hex docs serve to auto-generate then serve via hex-nexus at /docs. Add /docs route to hex-nexus that serves files from the generated hex-docs/ directory.
deliverables: hex-cli/src/commands/docs.rs — Serve variant: ensure hex-docs/ exists (auto-generate if not), call nexus /api/docs/serve or open browser
hex-nexus/src/routes/docs.rs — serve static files from HEX_DOCS_DIR env var or default hex-docs/ path
hex-nexus/src/routes/mod.rs — register /docs and /docs/* routes
Graceful fallback: if hex-docs/ not found, /docs returns redirect to hex docs generate instructions
phases.acceptance: hex docs serve opens http://localhost:5555/docs in browser; all pages load correctly; hex docs generate followed by hex docs serve shows up-to-date content

implementation_notes: Use pulldown-cmark for markdown rendering — already used pattern in codebase, zero config needed
minijinja for HTML templates — lighter than Tera, no proc macros
Clap introspection: call build_cli() from hex-cli/src/main.rs and pass Command ref to docs generator
Embedded assets use existing HexAssets rust-embed struct — no new embed needed
Style: dark theme matching hex dashboard aesthetic (CSS vars from hex-nexus/assets/)
All HTML output must be escaped — use minijinja auto-escaping, never format! with user content
